title: Cry of the Cormoran
original_title: Le Cri du cormoran, le soir au-dessus des jonques
overview: Alfred Mullanet, an unlucky player who lives on his wife's income, becomes in a few moments the object of interest of two thugs, Kruger and Mister K.
